diff -ruN /usr/ports//print/p5-Net-Printer/Makefile ./Makefile
--- /usr/ports//print/p5-Net-Printer/Makefile	2013-01-18 14:30:11.000000000 +0600
+++ ./Makefile	2013-05-12 01:28:09.000000000 +0600

-# $FreeBSD: ports/print/p5-Net-Printer/Makefile,v 1.9 2013/01/18 08:30:11 svnexp Exp $

-PORTVERSION=	1.11
+PORTVERSION=	1.12
 CATEGORIES=	print perl5
